disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Several months of progressive whole-body muscle weakness and fatigue, worst in the hips and thighs, making it hard to rise from a chair or climb stairs
trigger_question_examples: How long has the weakness been going on?
Which movements are hardest for you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been building for months. My hips and thighs feel useless — getting out of a chair or up stairs is the hardest, and today I just couldn't do it on my own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep, poorly localised aching pain across the lower back, pelvis and legs that is tender when pressed, worsening over weeks and severe today
trigger_question_examples: Is it sore if you press on the bones?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep ache all through my lower back, hips and legs, not one sharp spot. Even pressing on my breastbone or shins feels sore and bruised.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New, severe cramping and spasm in the calves and hands over the last 12 hours
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the cramps — where and how bad?
Are your hands or feet spasming?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: In the last half day my calves and hands keep seizing up in painful cramps — it comes on suddenly and grips hard.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sustained painful locking of the hands or feet, numbness or tingling around the mouth, or throat tightness — screened
trigger_question_examples: Have your hands or feet locked up stiff and stayed that way?
Any numbness or pins and needles around your lips or face? Any tightness in your throat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The cramps grip hard but so far my hands haven't locked up and stayed stuck, and I haven't had numbness around my mouth or any throat tightness — but it frightens me.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: It's mostly the cramping and the pain — I hadn't thought about my mouth or throat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden, severe, sharply localised pain in a hip, groin or the back, or an inability to bear weight after minimal movement — screened
trigger_question_examples: Has there been any sudden sharp pain in one spot, like in a hip or your groin?
Did anything give way or crack when you moved?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No single spot gave way with a crack — it's the deep all-over ache that's worst. Nothing suddenly snapped.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked sun deprivation — spends almost all day indoors with blinds drawn and rarely goes outside, over about a year
trigger_question_examples: How much time do you spend outdoors or in the sun?
What does a typical day at home look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly, almost none. I keep the blinds drawn and I've barely left the house all year.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Low, flat mood over a long period, with a housebound lifestyle, and slow healing of minor cuts
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed anything about how you heal or your energy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My mood has been really low and flat for a long time, and I've noticed little cuts take ages to heal.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High fall risk tonight — unsteady, rolling gait and inability to stand safely without support
trigger_question_examples: Are you safe to stand and walk right now?
Have you had any falls or near-falls?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm really unsteady — I waddle and lurch when I walk and I'm scared I'll fall. Tonight I can't safely get up on my own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular prescribed medications; only intermittent over-the-counter paracetamol with minimal relief
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medicines?
Have you taken anything for the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Nothing regular. I've just been taking paracetamol from the chemist and it barely helps.
